steps.title: Find the key contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts methane levels in tanks with watermilfoil (lower) versus duckweed and algae (higher), signaling a causal relationship between plant type and methane escape.

steps.title: Match the causal inference
steps.content:
A links the lower methane in watermilfoil tanks directly to its ability to prevent emission, aligning with the experiment's logic.

B and C introduce irrelevant comparisons or unstudied claims, while D contradicts the results by suggesting a mix of plants would help.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
